# Issue Template — Refactor

```markdown
## Motivation
Cite ADR-XXXX or `memory/architecture-memory.md` reference.

## Surface
- Modules / files affected.

## Proposed Pattern
<short description; cite precedent in codebase>

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Behavior unchanged (regression covered by tests)
- [ ] Tests still pass
- [ ] No new dependencies

## Risk
- Coupling during migration
- Hidden shared state

## Rollback Plan
<how to revert safely>

## ADR / Memory Updates
- Promote result to memory: yes/no

## Owner
@<owner>
```
